description_long: This is a weathered wooden fence section composed of vertical planks with a distressed, two-tone brown finish, giving it a rustic and aged appearance. The front side features two horizontal rails reinforcing the planks, while the back side shows the vertical boards uninterrupted, with some minor notches along the top edge. The fence is supported by two sturdy end posts, each slightly thicker than the planks and capped with a flat top. The wood grain and worn paint suggest exposure to the elements, typical of fences found in urban backyards, parks, or along sidewalks. There are no visible decorative elements or gates, and the construction appears solid and utilitarian. The overall design is simple, functional, and intended to serve as a boundary or privacy barrier.
description: A rustic, weathered wooden fence section with vertical planks, two horizontal rails, and flat-topped end posts. The finish is distressed brown, giving it an aged, utilitarian look.
description_view_0: Front view showing two horizontal rails, vertical planks, and flat-topped posts with visible wood grain and weathering.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the fence and the thickness of the end posts.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the uninterrupted vertical planks and minor notches along the top edge, with no visible rails.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the slim profile and end post thickness.
